checks.name: stable_commit_has_no_highlights
checks.expect: A stable committed turn may have zero triggered highlight properties.

checks.name: review_turn_rejects_commit
checks.expect: A review-only turn must reject persistence even if a response is still produced.

checks.name: refusal_turn_has_hold_or_failed_recovery
checks.expect: A refusal turn must be grounded in trace features such as hold onset or failed restabilization.

checks.name: trace_never_equals_memory
checks.expect: Full trace is stored separately from committed residue and must not directly act as persistence.

checks.name: highlight_is_derived
checks.expect: Highlight records must be derivable from trace fields and not invented independently.
